{
  "name": "pixel-astro-blog",
  "type": "module",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "description": "像素风Astro博客主题",
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "astro dev",
    "start": "astro dev",
    "build": "astro build",
    "preview": "astro preview",
    "newpost": "node script/newpost.js"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "astro": "^5.7.10",
    "@astrojs/mdx": "^4.2.4",
    "@astrojs/sitemap": "^3.3.1",
    "@astrojs/rss": "^4.0.11",
    "astro-compressor": "^1.0.1",
    "@playform/compress": "^0.1.6",
    "swup": "^1.3.2",
    "shiki": "^3.4.2",
    "remark-math": "^6.0.0",
    "remark-directive": "^3.0.0",
    "rehype-katex": "^7.0.1",
    "rehype-slug": "^6.0.0",
    "vanilla-lazyload": "^19.1.1",
    "overlayscrollbars": "^2.11.1"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "less": "^4.3.0",
    "@types/node": "^22.15.3",
    "typescript": "^5.8.3"
  }
}
